description: Maps natural post tags to carousel templates. The first tag on a post that appears in any category's tag list determines the template. Tags not listed here are ignored for template selection.

categories.label: Claude & AI
categories.description: Claude, AI tools, and Anthropic-related content. Indigo/violet palette.

categories.label: Tech & Engineering
categories.description: Technology, engineering practices, and developer tools. Teal-black/cyan palette.

categories.label: Open Source
categories.description: Open source projects, contributions, and community. Forest/green palette.

categories.label: Mindset & Workflow
categories.description: Leadership, workflow, growth mindset, and solo developer topics. Amber-black/golden palette.

categories.label: BANCS
categories.description: BANCS org news, announcements, and updates. Navy/sky-blue palette.

fallback: Select the most appropriate template based on the post content if no tag matches.
